records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for escorting us to our landing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for escorting us to our landing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for escorting us to our landing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We were merely doing our job.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We were merely doing our job.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We were merely doing our job.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We received an official letter saying that the Administration would arrive for technical cooperation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We received an official letter saying that the Administration would arrive for technical cooperation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We received an official letter saying that the Administration would arrive for technical cooperation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm surprised you already knew.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm surprised you already knew.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm surprised you already knew.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We deliberately moved quietly to not cause any trouble, but it seems you have a competent intelligence agency.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We deliberately moved quietly to not cause any trouble, but it seems you have a competent intelligence agency.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We deliberately moved quietly to not cause any trouble, but it seems you have a competent intelligence agency.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Orders from the Oracle are never wrong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Orders from the Oracle are never wrong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Orders from the Oracle are never wrong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oracle... Are there still survivors of that project?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oracle... Are there still survivors of that project?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oracle... Are there still survivors of that project?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We only follow orders from the Command. We cannot provide you with information.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We only follow orders from the Command. We cannot provide you with information.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We only follow orders from the Command. We cannot provide you with information.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our mission was to get you safely to your destination.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our mission was to get you safely to your destination.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our mission was to get you safely to your destination.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They say that, but... their guns are still aimed at us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They say that, but... their guns are still aimed at us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They say that, but... their guns are still aimed at us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is no need to cause trouble for them by refusing their generosity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is no need to cause trouble for them by refusing their generosity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is no need to cause trouble for them by refusing their generosity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could you guide us to Ground Zero, then?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could you guide us to Ground Zero, then?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could you guide us to Ground Zero, then?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's going on?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's going on?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's going on?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did someone inform the Northern Union that the Administration was coming?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did someone inform the Northern Union that the Administration was coming?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did someone inform the Northern Union that the Administration was coming?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is news to me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is news to me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is news to me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They are even escorting us to a level 1 security area that they do not want outsiders accessing. Their hospitality appears excessive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They are even escorting us to a level 1 security area that they do not want outsiders accessing. Their hospitality appears excessive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They are even escorting us to a level 1 security area that they do not want outsiders accessing. Their hospitality appears excessive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps they also want to avoid any unnecessary conflict.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps they also want to avoid any unnecessary conflict.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps they also want to avoid any unnecessary conflict.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The best course of action right now is to accept their hospitality rather than assuming hostility.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The best course of action right now is to accept their hospitality rather than assuming hostility.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The best course of action right now is to accept their hospitality rather than assuming hostility.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it's an order from the top... it's highly likely that Felix has something to do with it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it's an order from the top... it's highly likely that Felix has something to do with it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it's an order from the top... it's highly likely that Felix has something to do with it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are they scheming?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are they scheming?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are they scheming?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our objective is to find the two people who went missing in the Northern Union.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our objective is to find the two people who went missing in the Northern Union.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our objective is to find the two people who went missing in the Northern Union.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If they know about our intentions, they might be hoping to prove that they had nothing to do with their disappearance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If they know about our intentions, they might be hoping to prove that they had nothing to do with their disappearance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If they know about our intentions, they might be hoping to prove that they had nothing to do with their disappearance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, not only did they predict our route, but they also know why we're here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, not only did they predict our route, but they also know why we're here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, not only did they predict our route, but they also know why we're here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think even a psychic could figure that out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't think even a psychic could figure that out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't think even a psychic could figure that out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps not by reading minds, but it is possible if they predict the future.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps not by reading minds, but it is possible if they predict the future.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps not by reading minds, but it is possible if they predict the future.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... Doesn't that premise sound odd? There's no way prophecies are real...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... Doesn't that premise sound odd? There's no way prophecies are real...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... Doesn't that premise sound odd? There's no way prophecies are real...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Are you being serious?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Are you being serious?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Are you being serious?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Oracle project. It's one of the technologies the Northern Union was researching.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Oracle project. It's one of the technologies the Northern Union was researching.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Oracle project. It's one of the technologies the Northern Union was researching.

records.m_Talk_ENG: According to reports, the one successful case and its core researchers were confirmed to be dead...
records.m_Talk_DEU: According to reports, the one successful case and its core researchers were confirmed to be dead...
records.m_Talk_FRA: According to reports, the one successful case and its core researchers were confirmed to be dead...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it seems that there are test subjects we didn't know about.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it seems that there are test subjects we didn't know about.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it seems that there are test subjects we didn't know about.
